news.t: Best ETFs to Buy in a Recession for August 2022
Best Oil and Gas ETFs for Q1 2021
MLP ETFs touch 2-month highs on oil price rebound
Investors need 'a steel stomach' to buy into energy at these levels, ETF expert says

holdings.infoBox: MLPX is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are TC Energy stock at 9.44%, Enbridge at 9.27%, The Williams Companies at 8.57%, Kinder Morgan at 7.80%, and ONEOK at 6.96%.

overview.description: The Global X MLP & Energy Infrastructure ETF (MLPX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund tracks an index of MLPs and companies engaged in energy infrastructure. The ETF is structured as an open-ended fund. MLPX was launched on Aug 7, 2013 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: MLP ETFs touch 2-month highs on oil price rebound
data.text: Exchange-traded funds tied to energy infrastructure outperformed Tuesday, as the oil price CL00, +1.34% regained some ground and more data confirmed the economic rebound.

data.title: Investors need 'a steel stomach' to buy into energy at these levels, ETF expert says
data.text: As oil prices fall despite supply softness, experts in the exchange-traded fund field vet investors' remaining options in the space.
